matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Latin American Studies is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: This course is designed to meet the needs of two groups: those who have developed an interest in Latin America through study or work and wish to develop this for personal or professional reasons, and those who intend to proceed to a doctorate, and possibly an academic career in the field. The course seeks to provide participants with a critical understanding of Latin America in all its complexity, and of the means and methods that have been devised to study and understand it better. This is achieved through the three main elements of the course:
